name: temporal
explanation: Temporal uses the standard OpenMetrics V2 instances template with a single required openmetrics_endpoint. The Temporal server exposes Prometheus metrics on a configurable listenAddress + handlerPath; in typical deployments this is a single host+port pair (commonly 8000 or 9090) and no credentials are required. Pattern A: OpenMetrics on a known port.
notes: Endpoint port is user-configured server-side; discovery layer can scan likely Prometheus ports.
